per_raw_signal_candidates.issue_title: stdlib: native write_file / read_file API for content > 64KB to avoid ARG_MAX heredoc-via-cmdline pattern
self/main.hexa source_key MUST canonicalize file path via realpath || readlink -f BEFORE sha256 (current pwd -P+basename canonicalizes dir symlinks but not file symlinks → divergent cache slot keys)
per_raw_signal_candidates.minimal_reproducer_pointer: /Users/ghost/core/hexa-lang/self/main.hexa:1071-1082 (source_key) + :1080 (fix line) + :1120 (cache_schema_version v5→v6 bump) + :782-784 (install_dir_from_argv0 proven realpath idiom)

per_raw_signal_candidates.issue_title: stdlib: find_after(line: string, needle: string, start: int) -> int helper for prefix-skip semantics — first-match find() ignores prefix-skip intent in structured-format parsers
per_raw_signal_candidates.minimal_reproducer_pointer: hxc_migrate.hexa A15 _process_tree_decl — `let space_idx = line.find(' ')` on '# tree:0.A 2a62ba65:[...]' returns 1 (between '#' and 'tree:') NOT 10 (between '2a62ba65' and ':') (Bug 4); documented at /Users/ghost/core/anima/docs/hxc_phase8_closure_20260428.md; AST audit surface 813 hexa files / 1462 find call sites
per_raw_signal_candidates.evidence_anchor: /private/tmp/claude-501/-Users-ghost-core-anima/e8d30a3e-9b9f-4aec-b681-348a3ba457ae/tasks/ae7c7e12514252f55.output (partial — supplemented by Phase 8 doc per raw 91 C3 honesty)

axis_b.rationale: user said 'tracking id placeholder' — no real GitHub issue/PR id available at write time. Choose a placeholder convention that (a) does not fabricate a filed-id, (b) survives grep/sweep when real id arrives, (c) signals to readers that the slot is OPEN. β index 15 mod 2 = 1 → favor slug-readable form. axis_a (per-raw enum) 와 axis_c (file structure) 에 직교 — '식별자 표기 규약' axis 분리.

options_considered.name: hexa-lang/issues/TBD-<slug>
options_considered.rejection_rationale: CHOSEN — slug half stable across the lifetime of the placeholder → grep-survivable on real id arrival; 'TBD' prefix explicit honesty marker (raw 91 C3); slug readable to humans (e.g. 'TBD-stdlib-native-write-file' encodes the request even before id assigned).
options_considered.trade_off: two-step replacement on filing (TBD → real id), but the slug stays as a comment hint.

options_considered.name: hexa-lang/issues/0 (numeric stub)
options_considered.rejection_rationale: REJECTED — 0 is a valid id-shape and could be confused with a real filed issue (issue numbers may start at 1 but '0' is an ambiguous placeholder); no slug readable hint; grep-noise (every '0' false-positives).

options_considered.name: hexa-lang/issues/<empty>
options_considered.rejection_rationale: REJECTED — empty placeholder is parsing-fragile and may be silently dropped by tooling; not human-readable; no slug encoded.

options_considered.name: uuid-stub like hexa-lang/issues/uuid:<random>
options_considered.rejection_rationale: REJECTED — over-engineered; no human readability; introduces a stable-but-meaningless identifier that obscures the underlying request title; grep-survivability OK but at the cost of legibility.
options_considered.trade_off: n/a — slug form (A) wins on legibility without sacrificing grep-survivability.

chosen_format_validation.raw_91_c3_honesty_marker: TBD prefix is the honesty marker — 'this is a placeholder, not a filed id'
chosen_format_validation.grep_survivability: slug remains unique post-fill; convergence_writeback_target_lint can scan for TBD-<slug> + filed-id pair
chosen_format_validation.human_readability: slug encodes request semantics (e.g. TBD-stdlib-find-after immediately conveys the proposed addition)

tracking_id_format_decision.raw_91_c3_compliance: honesty_no_fabrication_evidence MUST cite 'tracking ids are EXPLICITLY PLACEHOLDER — not fabricated as filed' to satisfy raw 91 C3 (no fabrication).

axis_c.rationale: convergence file convention in nexus uses @attr-style (per existing /Users/ghost/core/nexus/convergence/*.convergence reference). Choose section structure that (a) makes 4-raw-mapping bisectable, (b) carries cross-cutting pattern anchor, (c) leaves carry-forward signals for downstream lint pairing. axis_a 와 axis_b 에 직교 — '파일 구성' axis.

structure_validation.bisectability: each raw in its own @rN_* attr group → grep '@r144_' isolates raw 144 fields; per-raw bisect on field absence trivial
structure_validation.cross_cutting_visibility: cross_cutting_pattern_anchors single-line cite of all 4 raw numbers + 5 NARROW row labels = F4 verdict-check survives single-grep
structure_validation.carry_forward_visible: 5 @cf-* lines each one carry-forward direction (file issues / sweep / implement lint / honesty / pair witness)

fan_out.correlation_estimate: axis_a ⊥ axis_b ⊥ axis_c — per-raw enumeration content (4×11 attr matrix) vs tracking-id format decision (4-option choice) vs file structure (header/per-raw/cross-cutting/CF/honesty section taxonomy) share only the 4 raw numbers as coarse coordinates. No metric content overlap. Pearson rank ~0.10-0.20 across content vectors. Decision change in axis_b (e.g. choose option D uuid-stub) would not change axis_a entries' titles/reproducers; axis_c file structure would survive any axis_b choice.

obstructions.name: minimal-reproducer-pointer-line-numbers-may-drift
obstructions.description: minimal_reproducer_pointer fields cite line numbers (e.g. main.hexa:1071-1082, hxc_convert.hexa:191-192). Future edits to those files may invalidate the line numbers without invalidating the bug.
obstructions.mitigation: fix-line citations include both line range AND function/section context (e.g. 'source_key fn — fix site' for raw 145, '_process_tree_decl A15' for raws 146/147). On line drift, function/section anchor remains stable. carry-forward @cf-2 sweep can re-anchor on next cycle.

obstructions.name: hexa-only-constraint-precludes-github-api-verification
obstructions.description: User explicit 'hexa-only no external harness' precludes calling GitHub API (curl / gh / external HTTP) to verify or file hexa-lang issues in this cycle. Filing is a separate omega-cycle once the harness constraint is relaxed or a hexa-native HTTP client is sanctioned (raw 9 + raw 99 dialogue).
obstructions.mitigation: candidate registry (this convergence) is the v1 deliverable; filing is v2 cycle. carry-forward @cf-1 directs explicitly. No fabricated 'verified' evidence (raw 91 C3).
obstructions.status: documented as deliberate v1 omission per user constraint
